title: Hookera stellaris
taxonomy: Hookera stellaris is classified as a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae, commonly known as the water ferns. It belongs to the genus Hookera, which is a group of ferns that are primarily found in New Zealand. The classification of Hookera stellaris is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, and class Polypodiopsida. As a member of the Blechnaceae family, Hookera stellaris shares characteristics with other water ferns, such as its aquatic habits and delicate fronds. The classification of Hookera stellaris reflects its unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other ferns.
